storylines.title: The WiFi War
storylines.description: Zoe discovered campus WiFi throttles downloads in the IT building. A multi-agent controversy.

gossip.text: Zoe claims engineering students are torrenting massive datasets and killing the bandwidth for everyone in the IT building.
gossip.reverseText: Jin heard Zoe is blaming engineering for the WiFi problems. Jin says it's probably the IT building's own servers causing the issue.

gossip.text: Zoe says she reported the WiFi issue to Aisha weeks ago and Aisha promised to 'raise it with administration' but nothing has happened.
gossip.reverseText: Aisha knows Zoe is frustrated about the WiFi thing. She did raise it — the IT department said they're 'looking into it,' which means nothing will change.

storylines.title: The 6am Boot Camp Saga
storylines.description: Marko's eternal quest to fill his morning fitness class.

gossip.text: Marko convinced Prof. Arjun to try one session. Arjun was polite but clearly miserable. His exact words after were: 'I think I'll exercise my mind instead.'
gossip.reverseText: Arjun's knees still haven't forgiven Marko for that boot camp incident. He admires the man's enthusiasm but prefers his exercise in the form of walking to the tea kettle.

gossip.text: Marko is thrilled — Talia is his star boot camp recruit. 'That kid has heart! She's the only one who shows up on rainy days.'
gossip.reverseText: Talia loves Marko's boot camp. It's where she's made the most friends outside her hall. She's trying to get her corridor-mates to come too.

gossip.text: Marko has been trying to recruit Jin for months. Jin keeps saying 'walking to the lab is my cardio.' Marko considers this a personal challenge.
gossip.reverseText: Jin is aware that Marko is plotting to get them to boot camp. Jin has calculated that their daily lab-to-parking-lot walk already burns 47 calories. That's enough.

storylines.title: Nonna Rosa's Food Rankings
storylines.description: Rosa has opinions about every food vendor on campus. Strong ones.

gossip.text: Rosa is genuinely worried about Zoe's diet. 'That girl lives on poison water and crackers. She's going to get sick, mark my words.'
gossip.reverseText: Zoe knows Rosa is concerned about her eating. She secretly appreciates it — reminds her of her own grandmother. But she'll never admit Red Bull is bad for her.

gossip.text: Rosa caught Jin eating instant noodles for the third day in a row. She nearly had a meltdown. 'Darling, you're getting a PhD, not scurvy.'
gossip.reverseText: Jin is aware Rosa disapproves of their noodle habit. They've started eating them in the lab so she can't see. The guilt is real though.

storylines.title: The Doug Enigma
storylines.description: Nobody agrees on who Doug is, how long he's been here, or what he does at 3am.

gossip.text: Talia swears she saw Doug on the Rainforest Walk at 3am last Tuesday. She has a blurry phone photo. He was 'just standing there, looking at a tree.'
gossip.reverseText: Doug is aware that Talia saw him. He says he was 'listening to the possums.' He seems amused by the attention.

gossip.text: Arjun claims Doug was walking the Rainforest Walk before the library was even built. When pressed, Arjun says: 'Some things on campus predate documentation.'
gossip.reverseText: Doug has never confirmed or denied Arjun's timeline claim. When asked, he changes the subject to tree growth patterns.

gossip.text: Zoe has a theory that Doug is an AI that escaped from the IT building's research lab. She's about 40% serious.
gossip.reverseText: Doug has heard Zoe's AI theory. His response was: 'Can an AI smell eucalyptus?' He didn't actually answer the question.

storylines.title: Talia's Discovery Journal
storylines.description: First-year Talia is discovering campus and documenting everything.

gossip.text: Talia says Prof. Arjun showed her a secret study room on the 4th floor of the library that 'nobody else knows about.' She's added it to her discovery journal as 'Best Find of the Month.'
gossip.reverseText: Arjun is pleased Talia appreciates the 4th floor room. He says she's 'the kind of student this university was built for — someone who actually wants to discover things.'

gossip.text: Talia has started calling Rosa 'Nonna.' Rosa pretended to be annoyed but then made her a special batch of biscotti the next day.
gossip.reverseText: Rosa says she's 'just making sure the girl eats properly' but she's clearly adopted Talia. She's teaching her to make pasta from scratch.

ambientGossip.text: UNIHACK hackathon is this weekend at the Learning and Teaching Building. Over 200 students signed up.
The Inter-Faculty Sports Day raised $4,000 for charity last month. Marko was 'moved to tears' (his words).
Grafali's just raised their coffee prices by 30 cents. Rosa is not happy about it.
The Doug Ellis Pool is getting new lane dividers next month. Marko is unreasonably excited.
Someone left a 3D-printed duck on every desk in the IT building lab. Nobody has claimed responsibility.
The door to Engineering 31 Room 204 has been broken for three months. Jin has submitted four maintenance tickets.
